# Alex Hernandez — Full Profile

> Senior Systems Engineer & Cloud Engineer | Orange County, CA | hernandezalex.dev

## Summary

Cloud infrastructure and AI engineer with 7+ years of experience architecting and operating distributed systems at enterprise scale. Expert in designing cost-efficient, high-performance data platforms processing TB-scale workloads. Proven track record reducing infrastructure costs $1.2M annually while improving system reliability. Strong foundation in Python, Infrastructure-as-Code, and cloud-native architecture across Azure and AWS. Skilled at translating complex technical requirements into scalable solutions and partnering with C-level stakeholders to drive business value through technology.

Titles held: Senior Systems Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Cloud Infrastructure Engineer.
Location: Orange County, California.
Available for: AI consulting, cloud engineering, LLM integration, automation.

## Professional Experience

### Big 5 Global Consulting Firm — Senior Systems Engineer
February 2023 – Present

- Architected multi-tenant cloud data platform processing 10TB/day across Azure Synapse, Databricks, and Palantir Foundry, serving 50+ enterprise clients with 99.95% uptime and <5min P99 query latency
- Reduced infrastructure costs $1.2M annually (32% reduction) by implementing Infrastructure-as-Code with ARM/Bicep templates, automating 80% of resource provisioning workflows and eliminating manual configuration drift
- Engineered real-time ETL pipelines using Python and PySpark processing 500GB/hour, achieving 5x throughput improvement over prior Hadoop-based implementation
- Improved mean time to resolution 47% (8.5 to 4.5 hours) by building automated incident response runbooks; reduced P1 production incidents from 12 to 6 per month
- Led technical architecture and delivery for $500K+ data platform implementations, partnering with C-level stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable distributed systems
- Designed and implemented data governance policies, access controls, and compliance frameworks across multi-cloud environments supporting Fortune 500 clients
- Delivered technical presentations and strategic discovery sessions to executive audiences, driving adoption of AI/ML and data engineering solutions

### Healthcare Technology Firm — Cloud Systems Administrator
September 2021 – February 2023

- Managed cloud infrastructure for 1,000+ users across Azure and AWS, maintaining 99.9% availability for machine learning and analytics platforms
- Built Python-based automation framework for infrastructure provisioning and CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time from 4 hours to 15 minutes (3x faster feature delivery)
- Designed cloud-native data workflows with optimized cost structure, reducing monthly infrastructure spend 25% while scaling to support 2x user growth
- Deployed ML model serving infrastructure on Azure ML, achieving <100ms inference latency at 10K requests/day with automated scaling and monitoring
- Reduced support escalations 40% through technical training and comprehensive platform documentation
- Administered and maintained cloud systems across enterprise environments
- Managed infrastructure, access controls, and system reliability for business operations

## Technical Skills

### Programming & Development
- Languages: Python (7+ years, expert), SQL (expert), PowerShell, Bash
- Data Engineering: Apache Spark/PySpark, ETL design and optimization, data modeling, query performance tuning
- Practices: Git/GitHub, code review, automated testing, CI/CD pipeline development

### Cloud Infrastructure
- Azure (expert): compute, storage, networking, security, data services
- AWS (proficient): EC2, S3, Lambda, VPC, IAM
- Infrastructure-as-Code: ARM templates, Bicep, Terraform, CloudFormation
- Containers: Docker, Kubernetes, ECS/EKS
- DevOps: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, infrastructure automation, deployment orchestration

### Data Platforms & Databases
- Data platforms: Databricks (Apache Spark), Palantir Foundry, Azure Synapse Analytics, Amazon Redshift
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, Redis
- Data processing: batch processing, real-time streaming, pipeline orchestration, data quality validation

### System Design & Architecture
- Distributed systems: multi-tenant architecture, high availability, fault tolerance, scalability patterns
- Microservices: REST/GraphQL API design, service-to-service communication, event-driven architectures
- Performance optimization: system profiling, bottleneck identification, capacity planning, cost optimization
- Observability: monitoring, alerting, distributed tracing, logging, incident response

### AI/ML Infrastructure
- Azure ML, model deployment and serving, inference optimization, ML workflow orchestration
- LLM integration and AI automation
- Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer (AI-102)

### Security & Compliance
- Cloud security best practices, IAM policies, data encryption
- Compliance frameworks, data governance implementation

## Certifications

- Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer (AI-102)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104, previously held)

## Services

Available for consulting and freelance engagements:
- AI integration and LLM solutions for businesses of all sizes
- Cloud infrastructure architecture, migration, and optimization
- Data platform engineering
- Infrastructure-as-Code and DevOps automation
- Infrastructure cost optimization audits
